pr_branch.description: Branch containing the changes to review

rules.description: Optional subset of rules to apply, by name. Any active rule name is valid; "Abstraction Naming" and "State Derivation" are deprecated (covered by "Naming & Abstraction" and "UI / Business Separation"). When omitted, all applicable rules auto-run.

output_format.description: Preferred output format (json for agent automation, markdown for humans)

max_file_size_kb.description: Skip files larger than this size

output_dir.description: Output directory for the .md review file (repo-root-relative)
